mapper.sql: select c.content_id, c.tenant_id, t.tenant_name, c.vessel_id, v.vessel_name, c.captain_name, c.captain_phone, c.content_type, c.publish_channel, c.topic, c.tone, c.highlights, c.title, c.content, c.publish_status, c.push_status, c.push_message, c.publish_time, c.ai_provider, c.ai_model, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from sea_content_publish c left join sea_tenant t on c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id left join sea_vessel v on c.vessel_id = v.vessel_id
mapper.delete:
delete from sea_content_publish where content_id in
#{contentId}
